claim_bullets.bullet_text: But this is not how JavaScript works, as it tries its best to assign things and binds undefined when there isn't a match. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.105-106)
That match would fail in pattern matching languages, but JavaScript binds undefined instead. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.105-106)
JavaScript coerces values and passes undefined to keep executing, often requiring custom code to detect failure conditions. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.105-106)

source_record_text: Summary of the section 'destructuring is not pattern matching' from javascriptallonge.pdf
